question.label: Self-read opener
question.name: Before I share my view, how do you think the last stretch has gone?
question.description: Anchors the conversation in their self-assessment first; gap vs manager's view becomes a signal.

assessment.note: [SHALLOW] 'tough' lacks specifics on what made the last stretch challenging.

new_queue.label: Clarify 'tough'
new_queue.name: When you say 'tough', what specifically made it challenging? Was it the workload, team dynamics, or something else?

new_queue.label: What they're proud of
new_queue.name: What's something from the last quarter you're genuinely proud of — not what looks good, what actually was good?

new_queue.label: Specific feedback
new_queue.name: Could you share an instance where communication with the UX team was particularly challenging?

history.answer_excerpt: there are so many topics to cover and nwith every OE ther eis so much work
doing all the tickets for the backend stuff is very hard.
just so many ares, global app, oe x 3 , managing the team and all the POs coming directly to me.
